title: Example Using BLAST.cgi
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aq7h0","text":"Shows how to use the BLAST.cgi on an example genetic sequence. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Go to the BLAST.cgi site. https://blast.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/Blast.cgi
Click on Nucleotide BLAST found on the left of the page. a

Copy + Paste your FASTA sequence into the 'Enter Query Sequence' box found at the top. a Example sequence: >
Click "BLAST" at the bottom of the page.
The sequence will now be queried. The time required depends on the sequence length. If you use the example sequence given, it should be relatively quick.
Once complete the following graphical display is shown: a
